lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你也回高塔里来啦，嗯？
还是抵抗不住亮闪闪的东西的诱惑，是吧？！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你的那个战利品，我有好东西和你交换！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
可惜你不记得我过去的慷慨！
是啦是啦，你也知道涅奥就是这样……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 好吧！那我们就给你整点儿适合最终决战之类的装备吧！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...从.. 外面... 回来了么？
..我知道... 你会... 回来...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]...你的..
 ...猎物.. 在等待...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [sine]..两个...都知道..家族..的..痛苦...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[sine]..还在...寻找..认同...？
...[jitter]愚蠢[/jitter]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
一个小小的窃贼溜进了我的领域么？
别以为我看不见你啊？出来吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手从阴影中走了出来……[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
猎手啊，是什么让你回到了高塔？
过来吧，穿戴上这些赐福。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我为你准备了礼物，刺客，不用害羞。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 在她的傀儡之中，属你最让我吃惊。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
是什么夺走了你的第一次生命？是涅奥[sine]找到[/sine]你的么？
真可惜啊，你不说话。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 感染……？[jitter]荒疫！？[/jitter]拿了东西就走吧！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不传染？很快要死？建筑师能帮你？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
姐妹们在哪里？吓人又很凶的姐妹们！
做个好人！别像姐妹们那样！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]杀戮的生物，这里不需要暴力。
拿走我的一部分，寻找安宁吧……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]猎取战利品？当然，拿走我的一部分吧……
只有你安心就好……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你给我下了毒……？
那能有什么作用呢……？zZZzz……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]一个猎手！我会把你细小的利爪磨得更利！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]为何用匕首！！它不强大！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]静默猎手，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手逃离了战斗，沿途偷走了一把武器。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]你去了哪里！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 过来一点，安静的小家伙。我的眼神可不太好使啦……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你可以[jitter][b]信任[/b][/jitter]我的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你得了很严重的[jitter][b]疾病[/b][/jitter]呢。让我来照顾你吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我也见过你的姐妹们，你知道吧？都是很可爱的女孩子呢。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 哎呀亲爱的……你不会一直在都[jitter][b]战斗[/b][/jitter]吧？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 甚至都没有一句自我介绍么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你从何而来？
所寻何物？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[jitter]呵啊！[/jitter]
[jitter][red]死吧！！[/red][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
烦人的混蛋！
[jitter]消失吧！！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 杀人者。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你是不会有[jitter]好下场[/jitter]的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]瓦库向静默猎手展示着他的各种契约。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师还不够，把你的姐妹们也杀了吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 无需言语，我们两个是一样的。

别以为我看不见你啊？出来吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手从阴影中走了出来……[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
猎手啊，是什么让你回到了高塔？
过来吧，穿戴上这些赐福。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我为你准备了礼物，刺客，不用害羞。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 在她的傀儡之中，属你最让我吃惊。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
是什么夺走了你的第一次生命？是涅奥[sine]找到[/sine]你的么？
真可惜啊，你不说话。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 感染……？[jitter]荒疫！？[/jitter]拿了东西就走吧！！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 不传染？很快要死？建筑师能帮你？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
姐妹们在哪里？吓人又很凶的姐妹们！
做个好人！别像姐妹们那样！！

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]杀戮的生物，这里不需要暴力。
拿走我的一部分，寻找安宁吧……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]猎取战利品？当然，拿走我的一部分吧……
只有你安心就好……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[thinky_dots]你给我下了毒……？
那能有什么作用呢……？zZZzz……[/thinky_dots]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]一个猎手！我会把你细小的利爪磨得更利！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]为何用匕首！！它不强大！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]静默猎手，与我一战！！[/b]

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]静默猎手逃离了战斗，沿途偷走了一把武器。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [b]你去了哪里！！[/b]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 过来一点，安静的小家伙。我的眼神可不太好使啦……

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你可以[jitter][b]信任[/b][/jitter]我的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你得了很严重的[jitter][b]疾病[/b][/jitter]呢。让我来照顾你吧。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 我也见过你的姐妹们，你知道吧？都是很可爱的女孩子呢。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 哎呀亲爱的……你不会一直都在[jitter][b]战斗[/b][/jitter]吧？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 甚至都没有一句自我介绍么？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
你从何而来？
所寻何物？

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
[jitter]呵啊！[/jitter]
[jitter][red]死吧！！[/red][/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text:
烦人的混蛋！
[jitter]消失吧！！[/jitter]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 杀人者。

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 你是不会有[jitter]好下场[/jitter]的。

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: [i][font_size=22]瓦库向静默猎手展示着他的各种契约。[/font_size][/i]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 建筑师还不够，把你的姐妹们也杀了吧！

lines.speaker: char
lines.text: [sine]...[/sine]

lines.speaker: ancient
lines.text: 无需言语，我们两个是一样的。

old.description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...
old.description_zh:
[jitter]咚！[/jitter]

你的头顶传来一阵刺痛，一个念头刺入了你的脑海。

[purple][sine][b]“分享知识吗？？？”[/b][/sine][/purple]

你不知如何是好…

old.description:
You violently [jitter]rip the leech off your head[/jitter] and chuck it far far away!

There's a voice in your head:
[purple][sine]“NOOOOOOoOoooooOOOOoooo....”
old.description_zh:
你暴力地将[jitter]它从头上扯了下来[/jitter]，并狠狠地把它丢得远远的！

你的脑海中响起一个声音：
[purple][sine]“不~~~~~~~~~~~~…”

old.description:
[purple][sine]“HOW OSTENTATIOUSLY SCHOLASTIC OF A LABYRINTHINE MIND!
A VERITABLE CORNUCOPIA OF CEREBRAL SUSTENANCE TO DIGEST!”[/sine][/purple].

Satisfied, the creature pops off and crawls away.
You are [blue]flabbergasted[/blue].
old.description_zh:
[purple][sine][b]“何其浮华博大，迷宫般的头脑！
这简直是取之不尽的智识珍馐，当真让人大快朵颐啊！”[/b][/sine][/purple]

脑蛭心满意足地弹开了，随后爬向远方。
你[blue]大受震撼[/blue]。

old.description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?
old.description_zh:
你在错路上走了一段时间之后，你发现自己置身于一片由[green]蕨类[/green]、[green]灌木[/green]和[green]藤蔓[/green]构成的茂密丛林中。尤其是[green]藤蔓[/green]。精疲力竭的感觉油然而生，一个可怕的念头随之浮现在脑海里：

[sine][purple]“你迷路了，毫无防备，而死亡的阴影正悄然逼近。”[/purple][/sine]

你要怎么办呢？

old.description:
You're dead tired and take a nap...

...only to be awoken by [gold][jitter]something wriggling around[/jitter][/gold] on top of you!
old.description_zh:
你精疲力竭，小歇了片刻…

…不料却被[gold][jitter]在你身上蠕动的什么东西[/jitter][/gold]惊醒了！

old.description:
You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on...

You sustain yourself on [green]strange fruits[/green], [orange]crunchy bugs[/orange], and drink the nectar of [aqua]glowing plants[/aqua] but you start feeling [jitter][red]paranoid...[/red][/jitter]

But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some drawings of maps on the ground.
Problem solved.
old.description_zh:
你一路劈砍，在丛林中硬生生砍出一条路来，但它似乎永无止境…

你靠着[green]怪异的果实[/green]和[orange]嘎嘣脆的虫子[/orange]勉强维生，喝着[aqua]发光植物[/aqua]的花蜜，你开始觉得你自己有点[jitter][red]疑神疑鬼的…[/red][/jitter]

不过，随后你发现了一片空地、一条小径，还有地上画着的一些地图。
麻烦解决了。

You grab the [gold]Last Dish Title[/gold] from the belt and scarf it down.
[green]Tasty![/green]

你从传送带上拿了盘[gold]Last Dish Title[/gold]转眼间就吃完了。
[green]好吃！[/green]

old.description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]35[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each
old.description_zh:
你走进一间挂着歪斜招牌的小木屋，招牌亮得发晃，上面写着：
[aqua][b]“无尽盛宴—按饿付费！”[/b][/aqua]

屋里，一位[orange]身形修长的多臂大厨[/orange]正熟练地准备着[green]一份份小食[/green]，并将它们摆在一条[sine]蜿蜒的几丁质传送带[/sine]上。

大厨其中的一只手臂指向一块牌子：
每份[blue]35[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]

options.title: Observe the Chef
options.description_zh: 从[gold]牌组[/gold]中随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

old.description: Now that you've had your fill, you continue on your way.
old.description_zh: 既然已经吃饱喝足了，那就继续上路吧。

old.description:
Keeping your distance from a seat, you loiter in the shadows of the establishment's entrance.

[orange]The chef[/orange], unfazed, continues working. Studying this behavior and discipline, you seek to minimize unnecessary movement and emotion during combat.
old.description_zh:
你没去座位上，而是躲在店门口的阴影中观察。

[orange]主厨[/orange]面不改色，手里的活儿一点没停。通过观察这份从容与专注，你学会了如何在战斗中摒除多余的动作和情绪波动。

old.title: Big Mushroom
old.description: Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

old.title: Fragrant Mushroom
old.description: Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [red]15[/red] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random cards.

new.title: Big Mushroom
new.description: Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

new.title: Fragrant Mushroom
new.description: Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

old.description:
You bite into the [orange]Big Mushroom[/orange]. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

[sine]So yummy... you enter a [red]food coma[/red].[/sine]
This gluttony will cost you.
old.description_zh:
你咬下一口那颗[orange]大蘑菇[/orange]。这蘑菇肉质紧实，口感粉糯，让人十分满足。可你越吃就越觉得饿，仿佛这蘑菇正在以你的饥饿为食。

[sine]太香了…你陷入了[red]饭后昏迷[/red]。[/sine]
你将为这份贪吃，付出代价。

old.description:
You sample the [green]Fragrant One[/green], a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and [gold]rigorously train[/gold]!
Then, a sudden [red][jitter]stabbing pain[/jitter][/red] hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.
old.description_zh:
你试吃了一口那颗[green]闻着更香的[/green]，这种木质小蘑菇散发着一种微妙的贝类香气……

一股能量猛然爆发，驱使你奔跑、跳跃，甚至还够你[gold]进行一场特训[/gold]！
紧接着，一阵突如其来的[red][jitter]剧烈刺痛[/jitter][/red]席卷而来，那是尚且存活的真菌在你体内挣扎着，走完它最后的短暂时刻。

old.description:
[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)
old.description_zh:
[sine]上一次吃饭是什么时候来着？
…等等，这股奇妙的香味是怎么回事？[/sine]

循着气味，你来到了一处温馨的营地，各种[green]美味的蘑菇[/green]正在火上烤着！由于实在是太饿了，你甚至完全没想过这些玩意儿安不安全。
（你饿得甚至连旁边有个死掉的冒险者这事都没注意到）

options.title: Big Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

options.title: Fragrant Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [red]15[/red] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] random cards.

old.description:
The [green]medley of mushrooms[/green] looks the most appetizing so you go for that.

[red][jitter]“MY MUSHROOMS!!”[/jitter][/red]

The adventurer, presumably dead, attacks you! You knock them out, and with a seasoning of guilt, finish the rest of the fine meal.
old.description_zh:
那份[green]蘑菇拼盘[/green]看上去最诱人，于是你直接下了手。

[red][jitter][b]“我的蘑菇！！”[/b][/jitter][/red]

那个本以为已经死透了的冒险者居然跳起来攻击你！你顺手把它放倒。最终，在一抹负罪感调味下，你干掉了剩下的美食。

new.title: Loner
new.description: Gain [green]5[/green] Max HP.
new.description_zh: 获得[green]5[/green]点最大生命。

old.description:
You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]gold[/gold][red].[/red]
old.description_zh:
你向那群叽叽喳喳的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]问好，它们伸出水晶手臂拥抱住了你。

它们将自己共有的知识分享给了你，更为你注入了[sine]拟形魔法[/sine]，改变了你的本质……这些[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]还真是群可爱的小生物啊。

[red]其中一个偷走了你的[/red][gold]金币[/gold][red]。[/red]

old.description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?
old.description_zh:
你进入了一片[green]结晶树[/green]的林谷，树木开始[jitter]激动地颤抖起来[/jitter]！
一阵阵杂乱的[sine]问候与欢迎声[/sine]在你耳边不断响起，原来是一群[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]从树上[jitter]绽放[/jitter]了出来。

有一只[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]在角落里坐立不安的样子，显然不像其他同类那样善于社交。

你是去找一群变形灵，还是去找落单的那个？

options.title: Group
options.description_zh: 失去[red]100[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

options.title: Loner
options.description_zh: 获得[green]5[/green]点最大生命。

old.description:
You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.
old.description_zh:
你向那只孤单的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]伸出一只手，同情它内向的天性。
它送给了你一颗小小的水晶果实，你深知它们的传统，于是当场把果子吃了下去。

水晶果实让你的心智清明、使命感也更加坚定。你道了谢，再次向上方出发。

new.description:
You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.
new.description_zh:
你向那只孤单的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]伸出一只手，同情它内向的天性。
它送给了你一颗小小的水晶果实，你深知它们的传统，于是当场把果子吃了下去。

水晶果实让你的心智清明、使命感也更加坚定。你道了谢，再次向上方出发。

old.description:
You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...
old.description_zh:
你捧起双手，浸入[sine][aqua]螺旋漩涡[/aqua][/sine]。

泉水徐徐注满掌心，你闭上双眼，小口啜饮。

甘甜的水化作[sine]涡旋[/sine]流经全身，直抵你的[gold]核心[/gold]，涤荡了杂念与痛楚…

old.description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?
old.description_zh:
你偶遇了一个[aqua][sine]巨大的螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]。水流以精准而优雅的韵律回旋着，四周的墙壁也布满了螺旋纹路。

[purple][sine]转啊，转啊…转…
…转个不停…何等奇景…[/sine][/purple]

你要做什么呢？？

options.title: Drink
options.description_zh: 回复[green]0[/green]点生命。

options.title: Observe
options.description_zh: 为一张“[gold]打击[/gold]”或“[gold]防御[/gold]”[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]涡旋[/purple]。

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。 Add [red]Writhe[/red]到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

old.description:
[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]
old.description_zh:
[sine][purple]…啊~ 如此美丽…
它在旋转…不停地旋转。是啊……
噢！刚才那是…一点小水花吗…？
…这也正常。你也要寻点乐子，对吧，[aqua]涡旋先生[/aqua]…哈哈…
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

是时候离开了。
你低声呢喃，转身离去。

[gold]“谢谢你，涡旋。”[/gold]

old.description:
Foolishly, you plunge your arm into the center of the [aqua][sine]Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua], disrupting the equilibrium. The water becomes [blue][jitter]frigid[/jitter][/blue] and grasps you, carving [jitter][red]Invisible Spirals[/red][/jitter] into your arm.

Your fingers brush against something solid, and you grasp around in pain to finally wrestle a [gold]Relic[/gold] out of there!
old.description_zh:
你愚蠢地将手臂探入[aqua][sine]螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]的中心，打破了这里的平衡。
泉水瞬间变得[blue][jitter]冰冷刺骨[/jitter][/blue]并将你死死攫住，在你手臂上凿刻出[jitter][red]无形涡旋[/red][/jitter]。
指尖触碰到了某种硬物，你在剧痛中一阵摸索，总算从中拽出了一件[gold]遗物[/gold]！

old.description:
Above, a cocoon is [jitter]shaking and wriggling[/jitter], about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. [orange][sine]The cocoon ignites[/sine][/orange]! [jitter]What is going on?[/jitter]
In a flash of [gold]light[/gold] and [red]flame[/red], a [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.
old.description_zh:
在你上方，一个茧正在[jitter]颤动扭曲[/jitter]，似乎就要破茧而出了！

……它停止了扭动。[orange][sine]茧燃烧了起来[/sine][/orange]！[jitter]发生什么事了？[/jitter]
一道[gold]光芒[/gold]与[red]烈焰[/red]闪过，一个[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]向你冲来，试图要与你融为一体，以求完整。

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]

[sine]真是转瞬即逝的灵魂啊。[/sine]

[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]与你合二为一。这只契合灵体带来的活力迅速[green]治愈[/green]了你。

你[blue]重获新生[/blue]。

new.description:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a [purple][sine]poof[/sine][/purple].

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]
new.description_zh:
[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]被你的意志轻松挡下。

然而渴求着宿主的它仍然反复向你冲撞过来。最终它用尽了力量，[purple][sine]噗的一声[/sine][/purple]消散了。

[sine]真是转瞬即逝的灵魂啊。[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 欢迎回来，小可爱。让我来[jitter][b]烧掉[/b][/jitter]你的缺点。

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 进来吧，亲爱的！特兹卡特拉今天能为你做些什么呢？

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 不是来这里烦扰我的吗？真是个[jitter][b]不同寻常[/b][/jitter]的小小构装体呢……

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 要是他被自己的同类给毁了，那该多荒唐呀？

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 哎呀，要是你真的[jitter][b]确定[/b][/jitter]的话。

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 啊呀，你[jitter][b]燃烧[/b][/jitter]得真漂亮！进来，进来吧！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
你是个多么强壮的男孩啊！来，吃点东西吧。
空着肚子可没法[jitter][b]杀戮[/b][/jitter]！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
哦哦，建筑师还活着吗？那能不能麻烦你[jitter][b]快点[/b][/jitter]去杀了他呢？
我就在这里等着吧！

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 嗯，一具骷髅来到这个地方是要做什么呢？

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
我的目标很单纯，我要为我的家人们复仇。
我会前往塔顶，让他付出代价。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 进来吧，进来！我们来让你的火焰燃烧得更[jitter][b]明亮[/b][/jitter]。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 你周身的这些火焰，倒是让我想起了一样禁忌的东西。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 我认得写[jitter][b]那本书[/b][/jitter]的家伙。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 啊呀呀，真是位[sine]稀奇[/sine]的访客！你是哪位呀，亲爱的？

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 我不是什么亲爱的！对我说话得尊重一点，巨大的……东西人类！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
那我真是礼数不周啦？
特兹卡塔拉高兴地咯咯笑。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
你和你的伙伴们又回来啦？
我给你们做了好些[jitter][b]点心[/b][/jitter]哦！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 欢迎回来，王室男孩！看起来你在外头表现得[jitter][b]很棒[/b][/jitter]呢。

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 那当然了！只是在上层遇到了一些小小挫折……比如死掉。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 所有人都是从错误中吸取经验的吶。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 过来一点，安静的小家伙。我的眼神可不太好使啦……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 你得了很严重的[jitter][b]疾病[/b][/jitter]呢。让我来照顾你吧。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 我也见过你的姐妹们，你知道吧？都是很可爱的女孩子呢。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 哎呀亲爱的……你不会一直在都[jitter][b]战斗[/b][/jitter]吧？

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
哎呀，有客人！快进来吧，亲爱的！
特兹卡塔拉能为你做点什么吶？

特兹卡塔拉能为你做点什么吶？

old.description: “What kind of tool will help you [red][jitter]kill everyone[/jitter][/red]?”
old.description_zh: “你觉得什么样的工具能帮助你[red][jitter]杀死所有人[/jitter][/red]？”

options.title: Weapon
options.description_zh: 制作一张攻击牌。

options.title: Gadget
options.description_zh: 制作一张能力牌。

options.title: Protector
options.description_zh: 制作一张技能牌。

old.description:
“Excellent choice! Now what should it [sine]DO[/sine]?”
The [orange]scientist[/orange] rubs her hands together with glee.
old.description_zh:
“很棒的选择！那么，它应该发挥什么[sine]作用[/sine]呢？”
[orange]科学家[/orange]开心地搓起了她的双手。

options.title: Chaos
options.description: Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] [energy:1] this turn.
options.description_zh: 将一张随机牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合这张牌在本回合耗能变为[blue]0[/blue][energy:1]。

options.title: Choking
options.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses [blue][Choking Damage][/blue] HP.
options.description_zh: 本回合，你每打出一张牌，该敌人失去[blue][Choking Damage][/blue]点生命。

options.title: Curious
options.description_zh: 能力牌的耗能减少[blue]1[/blue][energy:1]。

options.title: Energized
options.description_zh: 获得[energy:2]。

options.title: Expertise
options.description_zh: 获得[blue][Expertise Strength][/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。获得[blue][Expertise Dexterity][/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。

options.title: Improvement
options.description: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.description_zh: 在战斗结束时，随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

options.title: Sapping
options.description_zh: 给予[blue][Sapping Weak][/blue]层[gold]虚弱[/gold]。给予[blue][Sapping Vulnerable][/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。

options.title: Violence
options.description_zh: 额外命中[blue]2[/blue]次。

options.title: Wisdom
options.description_zh: 抽[blue]3[/blue]张牌。

old.description:
“Whew! All done. This is for you! Now get out there and [red][jitter]slaughter[/jitter][/red]!!”

Little did you know, that [orange]scientist[/orange] went on to create hundreds of weapons, resulting in several thousand deaths within the Spire.
old.description_zh:
“呼——！大功告成啦，这个送给你！现在出去好好[red][jitter]杀个痛快[/jitter][/red]吧！！”

你不知道的是，这位[orange]科学家[/orange]后来创造出了几百件武器，导致了高塔之中数以千计的死亡。

old.description:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?”
old.description_zh:
你在翻越[red][sine]数不尽的尸山血海[/sine][/red]之时，遇到了一位正在搜寻破烂的[orange]疯狂科学家[/orange]。

“是的，嗨，你好！你看起来是个有实力的战士……我的下一件[green]暴行装备[/green]正需要一个测试员！你觉得怎么样？”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom card to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 制作一张定制卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

options.description_zh: 制作一张定制卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

old.description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

“Entrant [blue][Entrant Number][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold].”
old.description_zh:
你排起队，和众人一起进入一栋巨大的建筑物。

当你通过一道[gold]金色的拱门[/gold]时，突然号角响起、[jitter]彩纸爆裂飞散[/jitter]、天花板上还飞出了众多[sine]彩条[/sine]！

“[blue][Entrant Number][/blue]号进入者，你将成为今天[gold]审判[/gold]的[green]判决者[/green]。”

options.title: Accept
options.description_zh: 担当今天的判决者

options.title: Reject
options.description_zh: [red]拒绝是不被允许的。[/red]

old.description: A [green]wealthy-looking merchant[/green], presents his case. He is accused of [red]murder[/red] by one of his rivals. The evidence is thin, and you have a feeling that the man is innocent, but the onlookers seem out for blood.
old.description_zh: 一个[green]看起来很有钱的商人[/green]诉说了自己的案件：他被一个对手指控[red]谋杀[/red]。证据相当稀少，你感觉他很可能是无辜的，但是周围的看客们似乎都想要见到鲜血。

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]羞耻[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]升级[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

old.description:
You rule that all of the man's possessions are to be taken and given as processing fees for the court.
The crowd howls in glee!
old.description_zh:
你判定这个人的所有财产都要被充公，作为今日法庭的审讯费用。
人群愉悦地高呼起来。

old.description:
You go with your conscience and rule that the man is innocent.
Despite the boos and accusations of being a [sine][purple]“paid-off judge”[/purple][/sine] you feel like you did the right thing.
old.description_zh:
你听从了自己的良知，宣判此人无罪。
尽管周围嘘声不断，还有人骂你是个[sine][purple]“被收买的法官”[/purple][/sine]，你依旧觉得自己做出了正确的选择。

old.description:
A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] steps forward. You find a note in your pocket indicating that if you decide innocence you will be handsomely rewarded. The [gold]noble[/gold] barely argues against the [purple]corruption charges[/purple] and gives you a knowing smirk.
You can't stop corruption but you can pocket some [gold]gold...[/gold]
old.description_zh:
一个[gold]权势很大的贵族[/gold]走上前来。你发现自己的口袋里被塞了一张字条，说只要宣判他无罪就会得到巨额回报。[gold]贵族[/gold]对于[purple]贪污腐败的指控[/purple]几乎没有做任何反驳，只是特意向你露出一个得意的笑容。
你无法阻止贪污腐败，但你可以借此机会捞一些[gold]金币……[/gold]

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description_zh: 回复[green]10[/green]点生命。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]300[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

old.description:
The [gold]powerful noble[/gold] was [red]beheaded[/red].
One less [purple]corrupt noble[/purple].
old.description_zh:
[gold]大贵族[/gold]被[red]斩首处死[/red]。
世界上又少了一个[purple]腐败的贵族[/purple]。

old.description:
You don't [sine][purple]really[/purple][/sine] know that he's guilty... Yeah, that's it!
The [gold]bribe[/gold] has nothing to do with the outcome here. Nope.
old.description_zh:
你[sine][purple]其实[/purple][/sine]不是特别清楚他有没有罪……对，就是这样！
这笔[gold]贿赂[/gold]和判决的结果没有任何关系。完全没有。

old.description:
A [orange]nondescript woman with a hard-to-read face[/orange] steps forward. She is charged with the crime of [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. When the woman speaks, you believe her, but ample witnesses attest to her misdeeds.
Both sides of the story are compelling!
old.description_zh:
一个[orange]表情难以阅读的平凡女子[/orange]走上前来。她被指控犯下了[red]盗窃[/red]与[purple]诈骗[/purple]的罪行。这名女子开口时，你觉得她非常可信。但是有众多证人都作证说她做出过许多坏事。
两边的说法都很有说服力！

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards.
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]组卡牌奖励。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

old.description:
You aren't totally sure, but making the hard choice, you think the evidence is adequate.
Did you really make the right call?
old.description_zh:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但艰难的决定总要有人做出，你觉得证据已经算是足够。
你是否真的做出了正确的判决呢？

old.description:
You aren't totally sure, but you have a reasonable doubt.
You don't know if you made the right call, but innocence seems like the better choice.
old.description_zh:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但你有着合理的怀疑。
你不知道自己的判决是否正确，只是觉得无罪应该是更好的选择。

old.description:
[jitter]“YOU CANNOT REFUSE!!”[/jitter]

Shouts the [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold].

[jitter]“Those who reject this privilege are penalized with [red]DEATH[/red]. Do you still defy!?”[/jitter]
old.description_zh:
[jitter]“[b]你不能拒绝！！[/b]”[/jitter]

[gold]法院总仲裁官[/gold]大声喊道。

[jitter]“回绝此项特权者，将被判处[red][b]死刑[/b][/red]。你是否还要抗命！？”[/jitter]

options.title: Accept
options.description: Give in. Serve as today's Decider.
options.description_zh: 放弃。担当今天的判决者。

options.title: Double Down
options.description_zh: [red]直面致命的后果。[/red]

new.description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

“Entrant [blue][Entrant Number][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold].”
new.description_zh:
你排起队，和众人一起进入一栋巨大的建筑物。

当你通过一道[gold]金色的拱门[/gold]时，突然号角响起、[jitter]彩纸爆裂飞散[/jitter]、天花板上还飞出了众多[sine]彩条[/sine]！

“[blue][Entrant Number][/blue]号进入者，你将成为今天[gold]审判[/gold]的[green]判决者[/green]。”

options.title: Accept
options.description_zh: 担当今天的判决者

options.title: Reject
options.description_zh: [red]拒绝是不被允许的。[/red]

new.description: A [green]wealthy-looking merchant[/green], presents his case. He is accused of [red]murder[/red] by one of his rivals. The evidence is thin, and you have a feeling that the man is innocent, but the onlookers seem out for blood.
new.description_zh: 一个[green]看起来很有钱的商人[/green]诉说了自己的案件：他被一个对手指控[red]谋杀[/red]。证据相当稀少，你感觉他很可能是无辜的，但是周围的看客们似乎都想要见到鲜血。

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]羞耻[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]升级[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

new.description:
You rule that all of the man's possessions are to be taken and given as processing fees for the court.
The crowd howls in glee!
new.description_zh:
你判定这个人的所有财产都要被充公，作为今日法庭的审讯费用。
人群愉悦地高呼起来。

new.description:
You go with your conscience and rule that the man is innocent.
Despite the boos and accusations of being a [sine][purple]“paid-off judge”[/purple][/sine] you feel like you did the right thing.
new.description_zh:
你听从了自己的良知，宣判此人无罪。
尽管周围嘘声不断，还有人骂你是个[sine][purple]“被收买的法官”[/purple][/sine]，你依旧觉得自己做出了正确的选择。

new.description:
A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] steps forward. You find a note in your pocket indicating that if you decide innocence you will be handsomely rewarded. The [gold]noble[/gold] barely argues against the [purple]corruption charges[/purple] and gives you a knowing smirk.
You can't stop corruption but you can pocket some [gold]gold...[/gold]
new.description_zh:
一个[gold]权势很大的贵族[/gold]走上前来。你发现自己的口袋里被塞了一张字条，说只要宣判他无罪就会得到巨额回报。[gold]贵族[/gold]对于[purple]贪污腐败的指控[/purple]几乎没有做任何反驳，只是特意向你露出一个得意的笑容。
你无法阻止贪污腐败，但你可以借此机会捞一些[gold]金币……[/gold]

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description_zh: 回复[green]10[/green]点生命。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]悔恨[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]300[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

new.description:
The [gold]powerful noble[/gold] was [red]beheaded[/red].
One less [purple]corrupt noble[/purple].
new.description_zh:
[gold]大贵族[/gold]被[red]斩首处死[/red]。
世界上又少了一个[purple]腐败的贵族[/purple]。

new.description:
You don't [sine][purple]really[/purple][/sine] know that he's guilty... Yeah, that's it!
The [gold]bribe[/gold] has nothing to do with the outcome here. Nope.
new.description_zh:
你[sine][purple]其实[/purple][/sine]不是特别清楚他有没有罪……对，就是这样！
这笔[gold]贿赂[/gold]和判决的结果没有任何关系。完全没有。

new.description:
A [orange]nondescript woman with a hard-to-read face[/orange] steps forward. She is charged with the crime of [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. When the woman speaks, you believe her, but ample witnesses attest to her misdeeds.
Both sides of the story are compelling!
new.description_zh:
一个[orange]表情难以阅读的平凡女子[/orange]走上前来。她被指控犯下了[red]盗窃[/red]与[purple]诈骗[/purple]的罪行。这名女子开口时，你觉得她非常可信。但是有众多证人都作证说她做出过许多坏事。
两边的说法都很有说服力！

options.title: DECIDE: Guilty
options.description: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards.
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]次卡牌奖励。

options.title: DECIDE: Innocent
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]疑虑[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

new.description:
You aren't totally sure, but making the hard choice, you think the evidence is adequate.
Did you really make the right call?
new.description_zh:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但艰难的决定总要有人做出，你觉得证据已经算是足够。
你是否真的做出了正确的判决呢？

new.description:
You aren't totally sure, but you have a reasonable doubt.
You don't know if you made the right call, but innocence seems like the better choice.
new.description_zh:
你并不是很确定真相如何，但你有着合理的怀疑。
你不知道自己的判决是否正确，只是觉得无罪应该是更好的选择。

new.description:
[jitter]“YOU CANNOT REFUSE!!”[/jitter]

Shouts the [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold].

[jitter]“Those who reject this privilege are penalized with [red]DEATH[/red]. Do you still defy!?”[/jitter]
new.description_zh:
[jitter]“[b]你不能拒绝！！[/b]”[/jitter]

[gold]法院总仲裁官[/gold]大声喊道。

[jitter]“回绝此项特权者，将被判处[red][b]死刑[/b][/red]。你是否还要抗命！？”[/jitter]

options.description: Give in. Serve as today's Decider.
options.description_zh: 放弃。担当今天的判决者。

options.title: Double Down
options.description_zh: [red]直面致命的后果。[/red]

old.description: Gain [green]6[/green] Max HP.
old.description_zh: 获得[green]6[/green]点最大生命。

old.title: Prickly Sponge
old.description: Pay [red]155[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards with [purple]Steady[/purple].
old.description_zh: 支付[red]155[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给[blue]2[/blue]张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。

old.description_zh: 需要[blue]155[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

old.description_zh: 支付[red]65[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。

new.description_zh: 支付[red]55[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。

new.title: Locked
new.description: Requires [blue]55[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
new.description_zh: 需要[blue]55[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

old.description:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] carefully picks up the vial filled with a [red]bright red ink[/red] and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a [green][jitter]jolt of vitality[/jitter][/green] courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the [aqua]scribe[/aqua] gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.
old.description_zh:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]小心地拿起那个装着[red]亮红色墨水[/red]的小瓶，轻轻摇晃了一下，然后又用手做了个蘸取的动作。

你将你的手指往墨水上蘸了蘸，突然感觉到自己身体中传来[green][jitter]一阵活力的电流[/jitter][/green]！

[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]似乎对你的反应相当满意，礼貌地鞠了个躬，挥手向你告别。

old.description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.
old.description_zh:
在昏暗的通道中前行时，你找到了一个小店，里面有一个[aqua]憔悴的员工[/aqua]。四周的书架上[sine]塞满了[/sine]无数潮湿的卷轴与羊皮纸。

[aqua]抄写员兼店主[/aqua]注意到有客人进店，猛地回过神来，为你指了指书桌上摆放着的一些[gold]器具[/gold]。

options.title: Bloody Ink
options.description_zh: 获得[green]6[/green]点最大生命。

options.title: Prickly Sponge
options.description_zh: 支付[red]155[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。给[blue]2[/blue]张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]稳定[/purple]。

options.description_zh: 需要[blue]65[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

old.description:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] grabs the [gold]prickly sponge[/gold] (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls.

[jitter][blue]*squeak squeak squeak*[/blue][/jitter]

The prickly texture leaves behind [purple][sine]shimmering marks[/sine][/purple] that seem to stabilize the ink...
old.description_zh:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]拿起[gold]扎手海绵[/gold]（海绵还发出了一声吱吱声），把它往你的卷轴上抹去。

[jitter][blue]*吱吱 吱吱 吱吱*[/blue][/jitter]

扎手的纹理在卷轴上留下了[purple][sine]闪烁的印记[/sine][/purple]，似乎让墨水更加稳定了……

old.description:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] lifts the [jitter][gold]wriggly quill[/gold][/jitter] and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head.

The mark [purple][sine]glows bright[/sine][/purple], then vanishes...
old.description_zh:
[aqua]抄写员[/aqua]拿起[jitter][gold]扭动着的羽毛笔[/gold][/jitter]，熟练而迅速地在你的头上画下了一个奇怪的印记。

印记突然[purple][sine]大放光芒[/sine][/purple]，然后消失不见……

old.description_zh: 失去[red]50[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]。

old.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].
old.description_zh: 失去[red]9[/red]点生命。选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。

new.description: Lose [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold].
new.description_zh: 失去[red]35[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获得[blue]2[/blue]瓶随机[gold]药水[/gold]。

new.title: Hug the Tree
new.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].
new.description_zh: 失去[red]9[/red]点生命。选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。

old.description:
You scatter some [gold]gold[/gold] at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly.

They break open, and contain [green]perfectly intact potions[/green] within.

You nab the potions and flee.
old.description_zh:
你将一些[gold]金币[/gold]撒在树的根部，有两个黏土容器一声不吭地掉落在了地上。

容器裂开，里面居然是[green]完好无损的药水[/green]。

你拿起药水，立即逃离。

old.description:
The [blue][sine]whispering[/sine][/blue] compels you to give it [gold]gold[/gold] but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead!

It [red][jitter]thrashes about[/jitter][/red], scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The [green]tree-hugging experience[/green] [gold]transforms[/gold] you.

[purple][sine]...make hug.....?[/sine][/purple]
old.description_zh:
[blue][sine]轻语声[/sine][/blue]敦促你给树[gold]金币[/gold]，但你抵抗住了它的意志，反而上前去给了树木一个大大的拥抱！

它立即[red][jitter]摇摆晃动[/jitter][/red]起来，用枝丫刮伤了你，但最终还是平静了下来。这次[green]拥抱树木的体验[/green]让你有了一些[gold]变化[/gold]。

[purple][sine]…来个拥抱…..？[/sine][/purple]

old.description:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]
old.description_zh:
在通过一个[red]枯木林谷[/red]时，你遇见了一株孤单的白骨般的树。它的枝丫如同肋骨般向内弯曲，枝条上则挂着黏土般的球状物体。

真是棵[purple]瘆人的树[/purple]。它还在发出低语：

[sine][blue]…来做交易…..[/blue][/sine]

entity.name: Borrowed Time
entity.description: Cards cost an additional Energy this turn.

entity.description_raw_zh: 卡牌在本回合耗能增加一。

entity.name: Grasp
entity.description: Whenever you play a card, lose [blue]1[/blue] Energy.

entity.description_raw_zh: 每当你打出一张牌时，失去 [blue]1[/blue]点能量。

entity.name: Hunger
entity.description: Whenever you play an Attack or Skill, it is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].

entity.description_raw_zh: 当你打出攻击牌或技能牌时，将其[gold]消耗[/gold]。

entity.name: No Energy Gain
entity.description: You cannot gain additional [energy:1] this turn.
entity.description_zh: 你在本回合无法再获得更多[energy:1]。

entity.name: Scrutiny
entity.description: You cannot draw additional cards during your turn.
entity.description_zh: 在你的回合内你无法额外抽牌。
entity.description_raw_zh: 在你的回合内你无法额外抽牌。

entity.name: Blade of Ink
entity.description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
entity.description_zh: 每当你在本回合打出一张攻击牌时，本回合获得[blue]2[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
entity.description_raw_zh: 每当你在本回合打出一张攻击牌时，本回合获得[blue]2[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。

entity.name: Door Revival
entity.description: Internal power for Door revival mechanics.
entity.description_zh: 门扉复活机制的内置能力。
entity.description_raw_zh: 门扉复活机制的内置能力。

entity.name: Grapple
entity.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to the enemy.
